opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These blisters on my elbows are itching so intensely I feel like tearing my skin off, and I haven't slept a wink.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch is unbearable and it started spreading fast in the last day. I'm scared it's something really contagious like scabies and I'll pass it on to everyone in the house.

symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a day and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: started as a mild burning feeling, then little itchy blisters came up in clusters; the itch is now severe and relentless
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst itch I've ever had — I can't stop scratching and I've scratched some spots raw
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on both elbows and on my backside/buttocks
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse at night — I was awake all night scratching
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching makes it rawer, and it seems worse at night
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the itching and the blisters; some areas are now raw and scabbed from scratching
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't remember having exactly this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm exhausted — I didn't sleep at all and I can't concentrate

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a shared household and is worried about passing something contagious to housemates; no one else in the house has the same rash

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants urgent reassurance that this is not a contagious infestation and that housemates are not at risk

objective_data_offered.value: small blisters and bumps in tight clusters on both elbows and the buttocks; several spots scratched raw with tiny pinpoint scabs; the pattern looks the same on both sides
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera; lighting and focus are variable and the fine detail of individual lesions cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: no fever felt and no yellow pus or discharge seen from the scratched areas; skin around the raw spots does not feel hot
clean living space; no new soaps, plants, or obvious new skin products started recently; no housemates with a similar rash
